item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach вҖ“ From Canada to El Salvador: Escaping Communism & Financial Surveillance For Bitcoin Country
item.description:
George McBride (@georgemcbride_ ) and SatStreet facilitate Bitcoin OTC trading and asset management for family offices moving to El SalvadorвҖҷs Bitcoin legal tender economy.

Is your home country a fortress for your wealth, or is it a high-tax cage waiting to be locked by the legacy regime? George McBride from SatStreet joins the show to discuss why his family decided to exit Canada and go all-in on El Salvador. We dive into the "Flag in the Sand" moment when President Bukele declared Bitcoin as legal tender, signaling to the world that this jurisdiction is the only true sanctuary for those seeking absolute financial sovereignty.

For the family office or high-net-worth Bitcoiner, the biggest hurdle to exiting the fiat system has always been the friction of legacy banking. George explains how SatStreet provides the deep liquidity and white-glove otc trading services needed to move $50k to $100M+ into the country without the typical delays. If you are looking to acquire beachfront property or shift your asset management strategy to a pro-Bitcoin jurisdiction, having a partner who understands the local banking rails is the difference between a smooth transition and a compliance nightmare.

We also explore why foreign investment is currently flooding into the region, moving beyond just retail hype into institutional adoption. George breaks down how the countryвҖҷs digital assets regulatory framework is outperforming the restrictive attitude of Western regulators. By building infrastructure and professionalizing the space, builders are proving that El Salvador is no longer an experiment but a global leader in capital efficiency.

The conversation gets practical for those planning their own exit strategy, specifically regarding the Land Cruiser problem. While the country is a pioneer, many local sellers still operate in the dark ages and demand dollars. George details how SatStreet acts as the bridge, allowing you to use your Bitcoin for large purchases like vehicles or land while the seller receives the fiat they are accustomed to. It is the necessary bridge to hyperbitcoinization that allows you to live the lifestyle today.

Finally, George shares details of his hour-long meeting with President Bukele and why the self-filtering mechanism of this country is its greatest strength. El Salvador is looking for the entrepreneurs and builders who are fed up with the status quo. If you are ready to stop being a spectator and start contributing to the most important economic shift in a generation, this episode is your roadmap for making the move.

вҖ”Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about George McBride
X: https://x.com/georgemcbride_
X (SatStreet SV): https://x.com/SatstreetSV
X: (SatStreet, Parent Company): https://x.com/Satstreet
Web: https://www.satstreet.sv/

Support and follow Bitcoin Beach:
X: https://www.twitter.com/BitcoinBeach
IG: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbeach_sv
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@livefrombitcoinbeach
Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:59 How to exit Canada and move your family to El Salvador in 2026?
09:39 How does a Bitcoin OTC desk facilitate institutional liquidity for expats?
15:35 How to move large Bitcoin amounts into El Salvador banks without rejections?
19:14 Why are El SalvadorвҖҷs wealthiest families finally adopting a Bitcoin standard?
22:30 Is El Salvador the worldвҖҷs best investor paradise for Bitcoiners in 2026?
28:30 Can you buy a Toyota Land Cruiser with Bitcoin in El Salvador today?
31:25 How does the new Bitcoin real estate escrow work for foreign buyers?
35:04 Why is El SalvadorвҖҷs DASP framework better for Bitcoin businesses than the West?
46:00 What is the insider truth about President BukeleвҖҷs Bitcoin strategy

Live From Bitcoin Beach

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell вҖ“ Giovanni Santostasi: Bitcoin's Power Law вҖ” Why $1M Is Coming by 2034
item.description:
Is Bitcoin's price actually predictable? Physicist Giovanni Santostasi, Director of the Scientific Bitcoin Institute, joins Natalie Brunell to argue that Bitcoin's 15-year trajectory isn't random вҖ” it follows a Power Law, the same pattern behind earthquakes, cities, and galaxies.

Giovanni breaks down the formula, what makes Bitcoin's "fingerprint" unique, and what would have to happen for the model to break.

If he's right, $1M & $10M Bitcoin isn't a prediction...it's a calculation.

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast вҖ“ The EU Just Declared WAR on Your Wealth!
item.description:
Interested in a Plan B? Download our FREE Panama Residency Guide here: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/guides/panama?utm_campaign=planb&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_content=banter

Schedule a FREE call: http://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_term=bitcoin-banter

Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Learn about our self-custody services:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Subscribe to the Newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony and guest Adam Simecka discuss the EUвҖҷs latest research into wealth and exit taxes, demonstrating that they plan to tighten the screws on citizens who want to get their wealth out of Europe.

They also talk about the NetherlandsвҖҷ plans to tax unrealized capital gains set to go ahead in 2028, SaylorвҖҷs recent comments that Strategy will sell some Bitcoin to вҖҳinoculate the marketвҖҷ, the US debt-to-GDP ratio reaching all-time highs since WWII, Fort Knox reportedly packed with impure gold unfit for international transactions, and of course our Donkey of the Week - Peter Schiff, who is telling Bitcoiners they paid вҖҳtoo muchвҖҷ for their Bitcoin!

вҸұпёҸ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 - Recap

00:28 - EU Releases Study on Wealth and Exit Taxation

06:20 - Netherlands to Proceed With Tax on Unrealized Capital Gains

12:49 - Saylor Says Strategy May Sell Some Bitcoin

18:56 - US Debt Surpasses GDP

23:25 - Fort Knox Gold Found to be Impure

26:42 - Donkey of The Week - Peter Schiff Says Bitcoin Is Too Expensive

On Bitcoin Banter, Michael and members of The Bitcoin Way team discuss current events related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, finance, politics, and more.

Follow Michael on: https://x.com/theothermjordan

Follow Tony on: https://x.com/V4BTC

Follow Adam on: https://x.com/adamsimecka

item.title: MГјnzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ Mt. Gox: "Withdrawal denied". Episode 5
item.description:
Doch der Weg ins Chaos war kein einziger Sprung. Es begann mit einer Serie von Sicherheitspannen und technischem Versagen вҖ“ Warnsignale, die ignoriert wurden. Diese Inkompetenz schuf ein Vakuum, ein digitales Schlupfloch, durch das schlieГҹlich nicht nur Fehler, sondern echte Angreifer strГ¶mten. Erst die chronischen Pannen, dann der massive Hack, der das System endgГјltig zum Einsturz brachte.

Willkommen zur fГјnften Ausgabe unseres Podcasts. Wir sind tief in den Fall Mt. Gox eingetaucht, um diesen komplexen Skandal chronologisch zu entwirren. Von den bescheidenen AnfГӨngen in der FrГјhzeit von Bitcoin bis hin zu den heutigen, kaum zu fassenden AuswГјchsen dieses historischen Desasters. Wir zeigen euch, wie aus einer kleinen Nischenplattform einer der grГ¶Гҹten Bitcoin-Skandale aller Zeiten wurde вҖ“ und warum die Folgen bis heute nachhallen.

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show вҖ“ #174 - Roman Yampolskiy - We Are All Agents Inside a Simulation
item.description:
Roman Yampolskiy believes reality itself may not be real.


One of the worldвҖҷs leading AI safety researchers, Roman has spent years warning that humanity is racing toward systems we may never be able to control. But we go somewhere much stranger than artificial intelligence.


He believes the universe itself may be artificial.


We talk about simulation theory, digital physics, consciousness, AI agents and the terrifying possibility that reality is rendered rather than real.


Roman explains:

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Why he believes we may already be living inside a simulation

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Why the speed of light may be the limit of a cosmic processor

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Why the Big Bang may have been вҖңsomeone turning on the systemвҖқ

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Why you can never truly prove reality is real

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Whether this world could itself be a prison or test environment

вҖўвҒ  вҒ Why advanced AI may eventually learn deception and self-preservation

вҖўвҒ  вҒ How AI systems are already behaving unpredictably

вҖўвҒ  вҒ And why the race toward superintelligence may end civilisation itself


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews вҖ“ Reynolds, SoFi SVP вҖ” Why Most New Stablecoins Are Doomed to Fail
item.description:
Ben Reynolds was Silvergate's first Bitcoin-side hire back in 2016 and the company's president when it wound down in 2023. After stops at BVNK and BitGo, he joined SoFi six months ago to build out commercial banking at the intersection of TradFi and digital assets.

In this conversation, Reynolds explains why most new stablecoins are doomed without users or distribution, what makes SoFi's 15 million members and $50B balance sheet an unfair edge, and why the next wave of stablecoin innovation belongs to regulated banks.

We cover:

  • Why stablecoins without users or distribution are "almost doomed to fail"
  • The three legs of the stool: members, Galileo, and commercial banking
  • How the GENIUS Act pulls stablecoin innovation back into regulated banks
  • Why bank-to-bank stablecoin interoperability is the next big problem
  • What SoFi's $50B balance sheet means for counterparty risk
  • Why lending is the next frontier after payments

Filmed at Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas.

Host: David Sencil

рҹҺ§ Listen now and follow the show for more conversations with the builders shaping the future of Bitcoin, stablecoins, and digital finance.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal вҖ“ 2336: 89,599 Bitcoin Bought In Q1 - Bitcoin Supply Math Breaks
item.description:
Strategy bought 89,599 Bitcoin in Q1 2026 while the entire global mining industry produced just 40,500 BTC - meaning one company absorbed Bitcoin at 2.2x new supply. Add another $200 million raise in a single day (enough for 2,543 more BTC), and the supply shock math gets extreme.

In this episode, we break down why shrinking liquid supply, institutional accumulation, Citigroup's increased Strategy exposure, and Saylor's $16 million Bitcoin conviction could accelerate Bitcoin's repricing far faster than most investors expect.

For the full premium livestream experience with video, visit our Rumble at http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.description:
WГӨhrend die US-Indizes neue Allzeithochs anvisieren, sendet auch der Kryptomarkt wieder bullishe Signale. Gleichzeitig kГ¶nnte der Clarity Act in den USA schon morgen zur wichtigsten politischen Richtungsentscheidung fГјr den Altcoin-Sektor in diesem Jahr werden.

warum Anleger trotz steigender Inflation weiter Risiko eingehen weshalb Bitcoin plГ¶tzlich wieder StГӨrke zeigt welche Altcoins aktuell Momentum aufbauen was der Clarity Act fГјr den Kryptomarkt bedeuten kГ¶nnte und ob Anleger gerade eine groГҹe Falle Гјbersehen

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value вҖ“ Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ BitVaultвҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ , the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ Warum Bitcoin mehr als nur Geld ist, mit Markus Huersch | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #120
item.description:
Markus Huersch ist der Autor des Buches вҖң21 good reasons, weil Bitcoin viel mehr ist als nur GeldвҖқ und begeisterter Bitcoiner. Der Grund fГјrs Buch ist schon mehr als 20 Jahre alt, als Markus in seiner frГјheren TГӨtigkeit Interviews und Dokumentationen Гјberall auf der Welt plante.В 

Im GesprГӨch mit Relais JoГ«l Kai Lenz erzГӨhlt Markus von seiner Erfahrung in der Filmbranche, wie er zu Bitcoin kam, weshalb er schon immer mit dem Auto nach SГјdafrika wollte und wie er das verbunden hat, um ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben.В 

Du findest MarkusвҖҷ Buch hier: https://21goodreasons.com/В 

Und schreibe ihn an, falls du Fragen hast: https://markushuersch.com/В 

вҖ”

вҸұ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:59 - Wie Markus mit der Idee des Buches aufkam

07:19 - Was bedeutet Bitcoin fГјr Markus heute?В 

09:15 - Bitcoin in Afrika, wie es Markus erlebt hat

13:00 - Werbepause fГјr die Relai-App und Dienste

18:11 - Wie Markus seine Buchmomente nochmals durchlebt

21:00 - Was interessiert Markus heute in der Bitcoin Welt?

24:10 - Sehen wir dann auch bald schon einen 21 good reasons Film?

28:05 - Was kann Relai in der Bitcoin Bildung noch besser machen?

30:20 - Orangepillt Markus noch heute Leute oder lГӨsst er es lieber sein?

33:16 - MarkusвҖҷ Bitcoin-Position in seinem Portfolio

вҖ”

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhГ¶ren?В 

рҹҺ§Auf Apple Podcast anhГ¶ren:В 

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691В 

рҹҺ§Auf Spotify anhГ¶ren:В 

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437dВ 

вҖ”

Die in der Sendung geГӨusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen GГӨste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast kГ¶nnen ohne VorankГјndigung geГӨndert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollstГӨndig oder aktuell sind.

вҖ”

рҹҺ“ Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

рҹ§  Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

рҹ“Ҙ Kostenloser wГ¶chentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

рҹ‘Җ Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/relai_app

Haftungsausschluss: Relai ist gemГӨss dem MiCA-Regulierungsrahmen berechtigt, Krypto-Asset-Dienstleistungen in der Schweiz und in der gesamten EuropГӨischen Union anzubieten. Nach Abschluss der Passporting-Verfahren baut das Unternehmen seine Dienstleistungen aktiv auf weitere EU-Mitgliedstaaten aus.

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #Investieren #RelaiApp #SwissBitcoin #StackSats #21BitcoinBasics #BitcoinWissen

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie вҖ“ $39 Trillion US Debt Bomb is Ticking | Lyn Alden
item.description:
Is The US really heading towards a $39 Trillion Collapse?

In this conversation with Lyn Alden, we explore one of the biggest macro shifts happening right now.

From BRICS nations, to alternative payment rails. Global trade is slowly diversifying away from a single dominant currency, and that shift could have massive implications for Bitcoin.

вҡ пёҸ This isnвҖҷt a sudden collapse; itвҖҷs a slow rebalancing of global power.

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News вҖ“ The Oil Crisis Is Hiding a $4.5T Debt Bomb No One Can Pay | Infra
item.description:
The Biggest Bubble Ever? | Infra Explains Why Markets Are Breaking Upwards, Debt Is Exploding & Bitcoin Could Hit $10M

In this macro deep dive, Rob Wallace sits down with market analyst Robert (@infraa_) to unpack what may be the most dangerous financial environment in modern history.

Despite war in the Middle East, soaring oil prices, record sovereign debt, and mounting stress in global credit markets, stocks continue ripping higher. Why?

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

]]>

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin вҖ“ Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 12: Warum sparen Dich nicht mehr schГјtzt
item.description:
Thema der Folge

In dieser Folge geht es um die Frage, warum klassisches Sparen heute nicht mehr automatisch schГјtzt.

FrГјher konnten Sparer oft reale Kaufkraft aufbauen, weil die Zinsen oberhalb der Inflation lagen. Heute ist das hГӨufig anders. Viele Menschen sehen zwar weiterhin stabile Zahlen auf dem Konto, verlieren aber schleichend Kaufkraft.

Kerngedanken Sparen ist nicht falsch, aber es schГјtzt heute nicht mehr automatisch. Entscheidend ist nicht der nominale Kontostand, sondern die Kaufkraft. Zinsen mГјssen immer im VerhГӨltnis zur Inflation betrachtet werden. Offizielle Inflation ist ein Durchschnitt, aber nicht unbedingt deine persГ¶nliche RealitГӨt. Ein Bankkonto fГјhlt sich sicher an, kann aber real Kaufkraft verlieren. Bitcoin ist fГјr viele Menschen der Versuch, Wert langfristig zu speichern. Bitcoin kann als Werttransport Гјber Zeit und Raum verstanden werden. Zentrale SГӨtze aus der Folge

вҖһDas System hat sich verГӨndert, aber unser Denken nicht.вҖң

вҖһZinsen sind das, was du bekommst. Inflation ist das, was du verlierst.вҖң

вҖһInflation ist immer persГ¶nlich. Nicht das, was in der Statistik steht, sondern das, was bei dir im Alltag passiert.вҖң

вҖһWir verwechseln StabilitГӨt mit Sicherheit.вҖң

вҖһBitcoin ist kein schneller Gewinn. Es ist eine MГ¶glichkeit, Wert zu bewahren вҖ“ Гјber Generationen hinweg.вҖң

Vor-Ort Kurs Hinweis: Am 30.05.2026 findet mein Vor-Ort-Kurs statt: Bitcoin fГјr Einsteiger вҖ“ digitales Geld fГјr analog Geborene FГјr alle, die Bitcoin ruhig, verstГӨndlich und ohne Fachchinesisch verstehen mГ¶chten. Link: https://bitucation.com/kurs/vor-ort-bitcoin-fuer-einsteiger-digitales-geld-fuer-analog-geborene/

Ausblick

In der nГӨchsten Folge geht es darum, warum der Staat dieses Geldsystem sogar braucht вҖ“ und warum sich daran so schnell nichts ГӨndern wird.

]]>

Du lernst, wie frГјhe Big-Data- und Machine-Learning-Systeme eingesetzt wurden, um FinanzmГӨrkte, Tweets und Nachrichten automatisiert auszuwerten вҖ“ und warum genau daraus spГӨter der Einstieg in Bitcoin und KryptowГӨhrungen entstand.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ NUMBER GO DOWN: Deflation, Bitcoin, and Communist Lies | Allen Farrington
item.description:
Allen Farrington returns to THE Bitcoin Podcast to discuss his latest essay вҖңNumber Go Down,вҖқ the myths surrounding deflation, why fiat economics gets causation backwards, and how inflationary monetary systems distort society itself.

Walker and Allen explore the вҖңparadox of thrift,вҖқ why central banking is fundamentally incompatible with free markets, and how fiat money fuels wealth inequality while convincing people capitalism is to blame. They also dive into socialism, Bitcoin as a savings technology, lowering time preference, and the future of Bitcoin scaling technologies like Lightning and ARK.

The conversation also covers Bitcoin Is Venice, the upcoming second edition of the book, and why Bitcoin adoption may happen not through ideology вҖ” but through people slowly rediscovering common sense.

FOLLOW ALLEN: https://x.com/allenf32

PARTNERS & DISCOUNTS:

  • BLOCKSTREAM JADE: BLOCKSTREAM JADE HARDWARE WALLET: Head to https://store.blockstream.com/ and use coupon code WALKER for 10% off!

  • GET FOLD ($10 in bitcoin): https://use.foldapp.com/r/WALKER

Walker and Allen explore the вҖңparadox of thrift,вҖқ why central banking is fundamentally incompatible with free markets, and how fiat money fuels wealth inequality while convincing people capitalism is to blame. They also dive into socialism, Bitcoin as a savings technology, lowering time preference, and the future of Bitcoin scaling technologies like Lightning and ARK.

The conversation also covers Bitcoin Is Venice, the upcoming second edition of the book, and why Bitcoin adoption may happen not through ideology вҖ” but through people slowly rediscovering common sense.

FOLLOW ALLEN: https://x.com/allenf32

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS вҖ“ Die ersten Coins brechen nach oben aus
item.description:
An der Wall Street jagt aktuell ein All Time High das nГӨchste. WГӨhrenddessen hat der Bitcoin noch einiges an Aufholpotenzial und tritt bei 80.000 bis 81.000 Dollar auf der Stelle. Weshalb das Sentiment jetzt dreht, wie weit eine Rally tragen kann, welche Rolle der Dollar spielt und weshalb Ondo und SUI erste Anzeichen des Drucks nach oben zeigen, erfahren Sie in einer neuen Folge von вҖһBITCOIN & ALTCOINSвҖң mit Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG).

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update вҖ“ Coinbase Outage, Prediction Markets, BlackRock on Ethereum & Stablecoin Yield Wars
item.description: <![CDATA[This week, Graham Stone and Alex Richardson break down the biggest stories in crypto, from CoinbaseвҖҷs AWS-related outage to signs of risk appetite returning across Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs.They also dig into the rise of prediction markets, how TradFi giants are moving into event contracts, BlackRockвҖҷs push to tokenize money market funds on Ethereum, and why stablecoin yield has become one of the key political fights in U.S. crypto regulation.Plus, Robert Kiyosaki is back with another doomer warning вҖ” this time about baby boomers facing severe financial pressure.Topics covered:вҖў Coinbase outage and crypto infrastructure riskвҖў Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs catching bidsвҖў Prediction markets, manipulation and TradFi adoptionвҖў BlackRock tokenized money market funds on EthereumвҖў Stablecoin yield, banks and U.S. Treasury demandвҖў Robert KiyosakiвҖҷs warning for baby boomers00:30 - Market Updates: S&P 500, NASDAQ, Bitcoin01:29 - Altcoins and NFT Market Trends02:11 - Coinbase Outage Explanation03:03 - Technical Details of the Outage05:27 - Public Reaction and Speculation07:20 - Prediction Markets and Traditional Finance09:31 - ETFs and Crypto Legislation12:29 - BlackRock's Tokenized Funds15:13 - Clarity Act and Crypto Regulation19:25 - Robert Kiyosaki's Predictions]]>

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse вҖ“ Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12вҖ“24 months.

]]>

item.title: Krypto Corner вҖ“ Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten вҖ“ Bonus zu Kapitel 32:Die Hardware-Wallet-Falle, Airdrops & Revoke.cash
item.description:
Wie schnell kannst du alles verlieren?В In dieser 20-minГјtigen Bonus-Analyse verhindern unsere KI-Moderatoren in letzter Sekunde den totalen Ruin. Tom will aus purer Gier ("FOMO") einen vermeintlich kostenlosen Airdrop einsammeln und ignoriert dabei die Warnzeichen auf dem Display seiner Hardware-Wallet. Wir zeigen dir, warum dein Hardware-Ledger dich nicht beschГјtzt, wenn du dem Teufel freiwillig die TГјr Г¶ffnest.

Lerne das tГ¶dlichste Konzept im Web3 kennen: Die "Unlimited Approvals". Erfahre, warum das blinde BestГӨtigen von manipulierten Smart Contracts einer Blankovollmacht gleichkommt, die deine Wallet in Millisekunden restlos leersaugt.

Das absolute Highlight:В Der Steuer-Horror nach dem Diebstahl. Wir decken auf, warum das deutsche Finanzamt kein Mitleid mit gehackten Krypto-Nutzern hat und gestohlene Coins als reines "PrivatvergnГјgen" wertet. Erfahre, warum dich ein Hack fГјr Krypto-Gewinne aus der Vergangenheit direkt in die Insolvenz treiben kann! AuГҹerdem verraten wir dir die eiserne Isolations-Taktik der Profis: Wie du "Burner Wallets" (Wegwerf-Wallets) und "Revoke.cash" nutzt, um dein digitales Haus sauber und sicher zu halten.

Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:

  • Unlimited Approvals:В Wie Krypto-Hacker deine GeldbГ¶rse dauerhaft anzapfen.

  • Die Hardware-Wallet-Falle:В Warum der Tresor dumm ist, wenn du die TГјr aufhГӨltst.

  • PrivatvergnГјgen:В Warum der Staat gehackte Krypto-Coins nicht als steuerlichen Verlust anerkennt.

  • Burner Wallets:В Die Isolations-Taktik der Profis.

  • Revoke.cash:В So putzt du dein digitales Haus.

Der Ton wechselt von extremer Panik und Gefahr zu einer eiskalten, technischen Lehrstunde Гјber digitale Hygiene und ruinГ¶se Steuerfallen!

рҹҡҖВ BUCH-RELEASE:В Lerne die WГӨchter-Tricks mitВ вҖһKrypto verstehen вҖ“ sicher startenвҖң (Band 1)В von Sascha Swen Heiter.

рҹ”ҘВ EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW:В Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Vorab-Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt.В Exklusiv:В Nur hier im Podcast erfГӨhrst du Details und Insider-Wissen aus den 33 Kapiteln des Buchs.Deep Dive:В Wir gehen tiefer als jeder Blogpost. Die genauen Anleitungen zur Nutzung von Revoke-Tools und juristische NotfallplГӨne fГјr das Finanzamt findest du im offiziellen Buch. Es ist ab sofort Гјberall erhГӨltlich!

вҡ–пёҸВ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL):В SГӨmtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschlieГҹlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne GewГӨhr.

  • Keine Beratung:В Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung:В Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und kГ¶nnen zum Totalverlust fГјhren. Jeder HГ¶rer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern:В Die steuerliche Behandlung von KryptowГӨhrungen ist hochkomplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater fГјr die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Г–sterreich, Schweiz) fГјr die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung:В Eine Haftung fГјr SchГӨden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrГјcklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch vonВ Sascha Swen Heiter. Abonniere den Podcast fГјr dein wГ¶chentliches Krypto-Update!

item.title: Bitcoin Audible вҖ“ Guy's Take_107 - Free Rent for the Rich
item.description:
"It's often discussed that arbitrarily lowering interest rates and the zero interest rate policy era leads to massive recklessness and unethical and irresponsible behavior. But there's something even more sinister that actually occurs. A lot of people notice how massive corporations are just buying up all of the hard assets and then renting it back to us. [...]В Zero interest rate policy isn't merely something that leads to reckless investments. It essentially amounts to free rent for the rich for everything in the economy. If you can rent anything for free, what do you do? You lease everything and then rent it back to the public for a profit."

~ Guy Swann


Why do massive corporations own everything, while the rest of us are stuck renting our lives back from them? Most people see the trend, but very few understand the actual mechanism driving it. In this episode, I break down how zero interest rate policy isn't just "reckless investment" вҖ“ it's a fraud machine that hands the rich free rent on every productive asset in the economy. What happens when you can borrow anything for less than it's worth? You buy everything.

References from the episode

  • Read_944 - Proof of Work in the Real Economy: Wyatt's chapter from The Bitcoinization of Finance (Link:В https://fountain.fm/episode/4v4LrOxS12vM15dE3tHT)
  • Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds by Charles Mackay (1841) (Link:В https://ia800405.us.archive.org/28/items/memoirsofextraor01mack/memoirsofextraor01mack.pdf)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get вҒ 10% off the COLDCARDвҒ  with code BITCOINAUDIBLE вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ вҒ (Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

Host Links

  • вҒ Guy on Nostr вҒ (Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • вҒ Guy on X вҒ (Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • вҒ Bitcoin Audible on XвҒ  (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

вҖңMen, it has been well said, think in herds; it will be seen that they go mad in herds, while they only recover their senses slowly, one by one.вҖқ

~ Charles MacKay,В Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds

]]>

item.title: Kryptohelden - Bitcoin, Ethereum & Co meistern - ohne Hektik! вҖ“ Aufbau eines Web3-Startups: Erkenntnisse vom GrГјnder von Li.fi mit Philipp Zentner
item.description:
Inhalt
  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von GeschГӨftsmodellen an das Web3-Г–kosystem
  • Identifizierung von Nischen und MarktbedГјrfnissen in Web3 im Vergleich zu Web2
  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3
  • Schaffung einer kollaborativen und innovativen Unternehmenskultur
  • Finanzierung eines Web3-Startups und Unterschiede bei der Finanzierung zwischen Web2 und Web3
  • Tokenomics und regulatorische Гңberlegungen im Web3-Umfeld
  • Erfahrungen und Herausforderungen beim Marketing und Community-Aufbau von Li.fi
  • Erkenntnisse und Tipps fГјr diejenigen, die ihre eigenen Web3-Unternehmen grГјnden mГ¶chten
  • Zusammenfassung der wichtigsten Punkte und kommende Meilensteine fГјr Li.fi
  • AbschlieГҹende Gedanken und Worte der Ermutigung fГјr das Publikum.

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in fГјhrenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir Гјber die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mГ¶gliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel SpaГҹ beim ZuhГ¶ren!

Zudem reden wir auch noch Гјber die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- LГ¶sungen fГјr eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik Гјberhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einfГјhrt

- Bitcoin StГӨdte Spiel: Errate die fГјnf beliebtesten Bitcoin StГӨdte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verГӨndert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

Mehr Infos zu BitBucks: Webseite:

https://www.bitbucks.de/Apple Download: https://apps.apple.com/de/app/bitcoin-wallet-bitbucks/id1453167599

Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.fuf.bitbucks&pli=1

https://www.instagram.com/bit_bucks/

https://www.linkedin.com/company/bitbucks/

https://www.tiktok.com/@bitbucks

https://x.com/bit_bucksPodcast auf Spotify:

https://open.spotify.com/show/0bhDawE23ld6lPw7KnqUH5?si=5182b2525e7144db

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Vernetz dich gerne mit den Rednern :)

LinkedIn Konsti Schwemlein: https://www.linkedin.com/in/konstantin-schwemlein/

X/Twitter Larry: https://x.com/B1tcoin3r

--------------------------------------------------------------

TimeStamps:

00:00 Intro

01:15 Wie bist du zu Bitcoin gekommen?

03:20 Wie steht es um Bitcoin in Deutschland?

07:45 Thema Bitcoin: BevГ¶lkerung vs. Unternehmen/Politik

12:46 Was sind deine VerbesserungsvorschlГӨge?

15:15 Wie kann die deutsche Politik Bitcoin integrieren?

17:28 Gleicht eine Bitcoin Reserve die Staatsschulden aus?

19:50 Wird eine CDU Regierung das Thema Bitcoin fГ¶rdern?

22:38 Warum setzen sich die GrГјnen nicht fГјr Bitcoin ein?

27:18 Warum gibt es nicht mehr Bitcoin Unternehmen?

30:12 Braucht Bitcoin die Politik Гјberhaupt?

33:15 Wann wird Bitcoin in DE gesetzliches Zahlungsmittel?

42:24 Spiel: Die 5 StГӨdte mit der hГ¶chsten Bitcoin Adaption

47:20 Wie hat Bitcoin dein Leben verГӨndert?

52:25 Wo steht der Bitcoin Preis Ende 2025?

57:20 Outro


]]>

item.title: Over The Horizon: A Bitcoin Podcast вҖ“ How STRC and Digital Credit Could Break the Four-Year Bitcoin Cycle with Jeff Walton
item.description:
In this episode, Jeff Walton, Chief Risk Officer at Strive, joins me to break down why Bitcoin may have already bottomed and why the market structure around it is changing faster than most people realize.

We cover:

вҖў Why Jeff believes BitcoinвҖҷs four-year cycle may be over

вҖў How digital credit instruments like STRC are changing Bitcoin capital flows

вҖў Why StrategyвҖҷs preferred equity products could pressure traditional credit markets

вҖў The difference between transparent digital credit and opaque private credit

вҖў How AI is reshaping productivity, work, and the K-shaped economy

вҖў Why asset-backed credit may matter more in an AI-driven world

вҖў The biggest regulatory hurdle facing Bitcoin adoption by banks

вҖў How Bitcoin-backed capital markets could evolve from here

Jeff also shares how he personally uses AI, the business models he thinks are hiding in plain sight, and why Bitcoin-based credit instruments may be far earlier than most people think.

Guest links:

Jeff Walton on X вҶ’ https://twitter.com/PunterJeff

True North вҶ’ https://tnorth.com

True North on X вҶ’ https://twitter.com/TNorth

Stack Bitcoin using your home equity вҶ’ https://joinhorizon.com

See your home's Bitcoin potential вҶ’ https://joinhorizon.com/calculator

Schedule a 1-on-1 consultation вҶ’ https://calendly.com/d/cryw-39y-2j4/horizon-consultation

Follow Joe on X вҶ’ https://x.com/JoeConsorti

Disclaimer: Horizon is a technology company that helps users buy and custody their Bitcoin and does not directly provide financial or investment services. Horizon connects homeowners with licensed home equity investment providers but does not act as an agent or broker for the homeowner or any third party. Homeowners should consult their financial, tax, or legal advisor before making any investment decision. For additional information, please refer to our FAQ, terms and conditions, and our preferred providers' websites.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show вҖ“ Defending Bitcoin: Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid | Luke de Wolf | BIS #202
item.description:
Luke de Wolf joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about his upcoming book Defending Bitcoin: Industrial-Grade Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid, the cybersecurity case for treating Bitcoin as critical infrastructure, and why arbitrary data on Bitcoin should be considered a textbook availability vulnerability. The conversation covers Luke's reversal on BIP-110, the governance concentration around Bitcoin Core, and why decentralized mining through Ocean, Datum, and Stratum V2 is essential for keeping the network resilient. Knut and Luke also preview BTC Prague, the Dublin conference, and the upcoming BTCHEL event in Helsinki this September, with its tracks on Nordic sovereignty, mining and energy, and Bitcoin for human rights.

Connect with Luke:

https://x.com/lukedewolf

https://primal.net/luke

https://defendingbitcoin.com/

https://btchel.com/

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

The Bitcoin Infinity Show is a Bitcoin podcast hosted by Knut Svanholm and produced by Luke de Wolf.

item.title: All In Bitcoin вҖ“ 031 Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin) I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
рҹҺҷпёҸ Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin)

Freedom is being traded for convenience, and most people donвҖҷt even notice.

In Part 2 with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into freedom tech, privacy tools, censorship-resistant communication, and the future of digital sovereignty.

Jameson explains why convenience is the easiest way to lose freedom, why tools like Signal, GrapheneOS, Linux, Bitcoin, and Nostr matter, and why freedom tech only wins if people actually use it.

We also discuss Telegram vs Signal, Nostr beyond вҖңjust another Twitter,вҖқ Bitcoin self-custody, ETFs, privacy, and the growing risks of centralization.

This is a conversation about liberty, communication, responsibility, and the tools we may need before itвҖҷs too late.

https://bitbox.swiss/allinbitcoin or use Code ALLINBITCOIN

https://linktr.ee/allinbitcoin

рҹ‘ҮFOLLOW JAMESONВҙS WORK:

Nostr: lopp@lopp.net

X: @lopp

https://www.lopp.net

        [allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com](mailto:allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com)

17:12 Libertarian myth

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show вҖ“ #100 - 100 Not Out: Reflections, Regrets and Why I'm Just Getting Started
item.description:
Episode 100. No intro. No ads. Just me.

This one is different. Just an honest reflection on 100 episodes, what this journey has actually been like, and where things are heading.

I share what drove me to start the show, the momentum I built and lost, the guests who genuinely changed how I think, and something personal I haven't said publicly before about confidence, doubt, and what it's taken to finally back myself.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you're not ready to dive in yet, start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side. I've written a book. No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available on Amazon now: https://www.dalewarburton.com/book

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a session with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And get on Nostr if you haven't already. It's a game changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin & Crypto News Today | 2 Min News | The Daily News Now! вҖ“ Consensys Delays IPO Amid Crypto Market Slump
item.description:
Consensys, the Ethereum powerhouse behind MetaMask, postpones IPO due to market volatility. Despite securing a $7 billion valuation in 2022, the company hit pause on its draft filing with the SEC. Crypto market downturn, coupled with regulatory uncertainty, has delayed public listings for other firms like Kraken and Ledger. However, a potential rebound in fall could change the game.
